title: DPP Evidence Export Envelope
description: Envelope for exporting evidence associated with a Digital Product Passport — test reports, declarations of conformity, supply chain attestations. Used by procedures/ for evidence emission and by apps/ for evidence download endpoints.

evidencePayload.description: Pack-specific evidence content (structured by the pack's EvidenceAugmenter)

emittedBy.description: BPN or DID of the evidence emitter

sourceRuleIds.description: Rule IDs from the pack that this evidence satisfies

provenanceHash.description: SHA-256 of sorted rule_ids + source_uris (from ArtifactProvenance)

attachmentUri.description: Optional link to a binary attachment (PDF, signed document, etc.)
